name: E. J.'s Chocolate Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------FILLING LAYER-------------------------------
1 Pack sugar-free vanilla pudding
2/3 cup Nonfat dry milk powder
1 1/2 cups Cold water
1/2 cup Chunky peanut butter
-------------------------------FILLING LAYER-------------------------------
1 Pack sugar-free instant chocolate pudding mix
2/3 cup Nonfat dry milk powder
1 1/4 cups Cold water
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
2 cups Regular whipped topping
4 serving size Filling Layer 1: Add dry milk powder to pudding mix. Add water and mix until smooth. Beat in peanut butter. Spread in bottom of pie shell.
Filling Layer 2: Use the same bowl from layer 1 (no need to wash it). Add dry milk to pudding mix. Stir in water. Mix until smooth. Pour on top of peanut butter layer.
Topping: Spread on top of pie. If desired, garnish with chocolate curls made from 1 oz. of chocolate bar or mini chocolate chips. Chill before serving.
Each serving provides: 1 Bread, 1 Fat, 1/2 Milk, 1 Protein, and optional 150 calories (crust, 50; topping, 50; pudding, 30; garnish, 20).
